title: Ventura County mixed-use new build (R-over-M) — out of pilot scope
notes: Mixed-use new construction. Should classify as mixed_use_new_construction (out of pilot).
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 880 TOWN CENTER DR, VENTURA COUNTY (MOORPARK area)
New mixed-use building (retail ground floor + 2 stories residential above)
Occupancy Groups: M (ground floor retail), R-2 (floors 2-3)
Mixed occupancy: yes (non-separated per CBC 508.3)
Construction Type: V-A
Number of stories: 3
Building height: 41 ft
Total building area: 18,500 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13)
No tenant improvement — ground-up new construction
